title: Training

homepagePromo.title: Club nights
homepagePromo.text: The club generally meets Tuesday and Thursday evenings at Wisbech Rugby Club for adult running sessions.

heroIntro: Fenland Running Club generally meets on Tuesday and Thursday evenings at Wisbech Rugby Club. Sessions are supported by qualified coaches and run leaders.
alert: Confirm current meeting times, exact meeting point, session descriptions and safety briefing before launch.
expectIntro: Bring suitable running kit, weather-appropriate layers and any medication you normally carry. New runners should make themselves known to a coach or run leader at the start of the session.
